title: Kyc Refresh Dependency Enforcement
description: A risk-and-compliance control workflow that sequences screening, escalation, and approval gates before transaction progression. Focus case: kyc refresh dependency enforcement.
assumptions: Each KYC refresh case coordinates multiple resource bindings (profiles, lists, tasks) and enforces ordering of gates.
Screening profiles, data sources and watchlists represent available connectors and are explicitly bound/unbound to cases before use.
Escalation groups and attestors are pre-provisioned and have available capacity to accept escalations.
risks: Unavailable external data sources or remediation tasks may block case progression and delay legitimate transactions.
False positives in screening can generate unnecessary escalations, increasing operational workload.
Cross-case dependencies may introduce contention or race conditions if not coordinated, risking inconsistent finalization.
Excessive gating may cause customer service impact if approvals are not timely.
